acceptance_criteria.description: On quiz completion, a ScoreUpdate is sent to all groups
acceptance_criteria.notes: QuizTab.onComplete callback triggers publishScoreUpdate in topic/[slug].tsx

acceptance_criteria.description: ScoreUpdate includes all required fields including sequenceNumber
Members receiving ScoreUpdate update local cache (LWW by sequence)
acceptance_criteria.notes: subscribeToGroupMessages processes kind 445 events, parseScorePayload() deserialises, mergeMemberScore() applies LWW

acceptance_criteria.description: Group detail page shows member scores
acceptance_criteria.notes: groups/[id].tsx loads getMemberScores, renders MemberScoreRow sorted by points

acceptance_criteria.description: Leaderboard shows group members alongside own score
acceptance_criteria.notes: leaderboard.tsx adds group members section with fromGroup label, deduped across groups
publishScoreUpdate called with void + .catch(), never awaited in quiz flow
